sub_claims.text: Homeschooling parents can adjust lesson pacing based on daily assessment
sub_claims.confidence_rationale: This is a structural feature of homeschooling, not disputed

sub_claims.text: Most public school teachers cannot meaningfully differentiate for each student given class sizes
sub_claims.confidence_rationale: Research on teacher workload and differentiation limitations is consistent

new_evidence.text: Homeschool families report average 2-3 hours of formal instruction vs 6+ in school
